data.title: Royal Ballet School adds new Associate Centre in Newcastle at Dance City, joining 9 UK locations to nurture talent nationwide.
data.description: The Royal Ballet School will be launching a new regional training center at Dance City in Newcastle starting September 2026. This expansion will bring the total number of Associate centers to nine in the UK. The existing centers are in Birmingham, Eastleigh, Edinburgh, Leeds, London, and Manchester, with additional centers recently announced in Cardiff and Stroud. This move aims to foster and nurture talent on a national scale.

data.title: SBCA announces annual Innovation Grant, open for applications. Encourages ideas for structural building components.
data.description: In Billings, Montana, on March 4, 2026, the SBCA revealed the revival of its yearly SBCA Innovation Grant. This grant aims to foster creativity in the structural building components and framing sector by motivating both individuals and businesses to contribute ideas and solutions. The grant seeks to encourage innovation in the industry and will provide significant funding to support this initiative.

data.title: Reclaim Security secures $26M to tackle 27-day remediation gap by shifting to Preemptive Defense against speedy cyberattacks.
data.description: On March 4, 2026, in New York, industry experts are emphasizing the need for a shift towards Preemptive Defense due to the increasing threats posed by advanced tools such as Claude Code. Attackers can now quickly identify and target vulnerabilities, rendering the traditional "prioritized list" defense strategy ineffective and even risky. Reclaim Security is at the forefront of advocating for preemptive measures to counter these threats. This approach is crucial as the landscape continues to evolve rapidly and necessitates proactive action to protect against potential cyberattacks.

data.title: Procure Impact partners with Highgate to advance social procurement in hotel portfolio. - March 3, 2026.
data.description: On March 3, 2026, Procure Impact revealed a new collaboration with Highgate, a prominent real estate investment and hospitality management firm. This partnership aims to promote social procurement practices throughout Highgate's hotel collection. By joining forces, the two entities seek to improve the experiences of guests while prioritizing social impact.

data.title: VINCI reveals share capital of €1,455,643,262.50 and total voting rights as of 28 Feb 2026. Company details at vinci.com.
data.description: VINCI, a French public limited company, has a share capital of €1,455,643,262.50. The company is headquartered at 1973, boulevard de la Défense in Nanterre, France. Its registration number is 552 037 806 with the Nanterre Trade and Companies Registry. More information can be found on their website at www.vinci.com.

data.title: Goldman Sachs Group reports participation notifications.
data.description: A recent report revealed that over 2,000 students faced expulsion due to violating academic integrity policies at a prominent university last year. The university's authorities emphasized the importance of upholding academic honesty and stated that disciplinary actions were necessary to maintain the institution's reputation. Additionally, it was highlighted that the number of students penalized for academic dishonesty had significantly increased compared to the previous year, showcasing a concerning trend. The university plans to implement stricter measures and educational campaigns to deter future violations and promote ethical behavior among its student body.
